Title: Time & Date Manipulation
Description: The SQL92 standard functions for time and date queries are available in Virtuoso.
These map to internal Virtuoso functions such as curdate(), curtime(), and curdatetime().
Dates and times should be input or compared as literals using standard formats.
ODBC literal date formats can be used, or SQL92 CAST expressions can explicitly convert strings to date/time types.
The table of supported types and syntax includes Date, Time, and Datetime/Timestamp.
Datetime values must follow the format 'yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss[...]' when using SQL92 casting.
